sections.paragraph:
Original: אזל

Transliteration: 'âzal

Phonetic: aw-zal'

BDB Definition:

  1. to go, to go away, to go about
    1. (Qal)
      1. to go away
      2. to go about
      3. to be used up, be exhausted, be gone, evaporated
    2. (Pual) to go to and fro

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 56

Part(s) of speech: Verb
